metadata.title: systemic-tau-formal: Machine-verifiable Systemic Tau (τₛ) and RECD
metadata.description:
systemic-tau-formal v0.1.6 is an open monorepo for machine-checkable formalization and reproducible reference code of the Systemic Tau (τₛ) paradigm and the Discrete Extramental Clock (RECD).

What is new in v0.1.6

  • C3 synthetic cross-domain starters: finance / EEG / grid-like generators, pipeline_report, notebook 06_cross_domain_c3.py, docs/CROSS_DOMAIN.md.
  • First-return Poincaré Python twin + notebook 05_first_return_poincare.py (--plot).
  • Lean failedSimpleCandidates: finite simple algebraic forms of τ_ch = f(δ) ruled out; see docs/TAU_CH_DELTA.md.
  • Stress-Test 2026 workshop brief + public issue board (docs/WORKSHOP_STRESS_TEST_2026.md, docs/ISSUE_BOARD.md).

Stack

  • Lean 4.14 (lake build): operational gate g(τₛ), band lemmas, Feigenbaum partial formalization, simple-candidate non-identity lemmas.
  • Python reference core + golden rational bridge + pytest (46 tests).
  • Public falsifiable predictions, experimental protocol, epistemic labels.

Companion production package: PyPI systemictau. Prior corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20576241.

Epistemic honesty: operational thresholds 0.50 / 0.41 are Feigenbaum-motivated defaults; a unique closed-form τ_ch = f(δ) remains open. Feigenbaum reduction open goals 1–3 remain sorry. C3 kits are synthetic generators, not licensed field results.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus

metadata.notes: CI: GitHub Actions (pytest + lake build). Verify: clone, lake build, pytest -q. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21516059.
